headline: T‑Mobile US (TMUS) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business scale T-Mobile US (TMUS) stock has been under pressure recently, with negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months. This has drawn more attention to how its current valuation lines up with its fundamentals. The company reports annual revenue of about $90.53b and net income of $10.543b, entirely from wireless communications services in the United States, Puerto Rico and the United States Virgin Islands. See our latest analysis for T-Mobile...
